name: Dusthana-Associated Planet Dasha Financial Loss Gate
description: Planet associated with 6th/8th/12th lord without trinal aspect causes financial harm.

source_text.quote: A planet associated with one of the lords of the 6th, 8th and 12th, being bereft of a trinal lord's aspect, will in its Dasha periods cause harm to the native's financial aspects.

all_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of a specific planet is active
The active Dasha lord is associated with the lord of the 6th, 8th, or 12th house
The active Dasha lord is bereft of aspects from a trinal lord

interpretation.meaning: Planet contaminated by Dusthana lord association without protective trinal gaze becomes wealth-destroyer during its Dasha.

metadata.notes: Fundamental rule defining when a neutral planet becomes a wealth-destroyer.

name: 8th Lord Dasha Financial Crisis Gate
description: Dasha of 8th lord activates sudden financial losses and asset destruction.

source_text.quote: There will be... possibility of death and financial losses in the Dasa of the lord of the 8th...

all_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 8th Lord is active

interpretation.meaning: 8th lord Dasha activates the house of sudden destruction, bringing major financial losses and economic instability.

metadata.notes: 8th house governs sudden collapses and bankruptcy.

name: Rahu Dasha Bankruptcy Gate
description: Rahu MD in 8th/12th or debilitated brings severe wealth loss.

source_text.quote: If Rahu be in the 8th or the 12th... There will be loss of wealth at the commencement of the Dasa...

any_of: Rahu is positioned in the 8th house
Rahu is positioned in the 12th house
Rahu is associated with a malefic planet
Rahu is in its sign of debilitation (Scorpio)

interpretation.meaning: Rahu poorly placed or debilitated kicks off its Mahadasha with severe wealth loss, potential bankruptcy.

metadata.notes: Rahu amplifies loss when in negative houses.

name: Venus Dasha Dusthana Business Loss Gate
description: Venus in 6th/8th/12th during Dasha brings business losses.

source_text.quote: If Venus be in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th, there will be during his Dasa... losses in business...

any_of: Venus is positioned in the 6th house
Venus is positioned in the 8th house
Venus is positioned in the 12th house

interpretation.meaning: Venus in Dusthana brings destruction of commercial prosperity and major business losses.

metadata.notes: Links poorly placed Venus to commercial failure.

name: Rahu 2nd House Capital Drain Gate
description: Rahu in 2nd house damages savings at Dasha onset.

source_text.quote: The natural characteristics of the house occupied by Rahu are harmed at the commencement of the Dasha. If such house be 2nd, there will be loss of wealth.

all_of: Rahu Mahadasha or Antardasha is active
Rahu is positioned in the 2nd house

interpretation.meaning: Rahu in 2nd house damages savings at onset of Dasha, causing immediate loss of capital.

metadata.notes: Specific timing rule targeting beginning of Rahu period in 2nd house.

name: Jupiter-Saturn Dasha Industrial Loss Gate
description: Saturn AD in Jupiter MD with adverse alignment causes financial loss.

source_text.quote: Effects like loss of wealth... obstacles in industrial ventures... if Saturn be in the 6th, 8th or 12th from Jupiter...

any_of: Saturn is positioned in the 6th house from Jupiter
Saturn is positioned in the 8th house from Jupiter
Saturn is positioned in the 12th house from Jupiter
Saturn is associated with a malefic planet

interpretation.meaning: Saturn in unfavorable angle from Jupiter creates severe friction causing financial loss and industrial obstacles.

metadata.notes: Dasha Pravesh (relative positioning) between MD and AD lords is critical.

name: Mercury Dasha Dusthana Asset Loss Gate
description: Mercury in Dusthana during Dasha causes asset destruction through poor judgment.

source_text.quote: If Mercury be in the 6th, 8th or 12th, there will be loss of wealth... loss of land and cattle, etc.

any_of: Mercury is positioned in the 6th house
Mercury is positioned in the 8th house
Mercury is positioned in the 12th house

interpretation.meaning: Mercury in Dusthana causes asset destruction through poor financial judgment, leading to forced sale of assets.

metadata.notes: Planet of commerce fails to retain capital in houses of loss.

name: Saturn-Mars Dasha Debt Accumulation Gate
description: Saturn MD with Mars AD in adverse conditions triggers debt.

source_text.quote: There will be loss of wealth... unnecessary expenditure... if Mars be in debilitation or combust, or in 8th/12th from Saturn.

any_of: Mars is in the 8th house from Saturn
Mars is in the 12th house from Saturn

interpretation.meaning: Saturn-Mars combination triggers heavy financial drain and debt when Mars is weakened.

metadata.notes: Classic indicator of sudden financial crises directed into debt accumulation.
